user.title: Add Bitcoin Wallet
user.description: Enter a single Bitcoin address (1…, 3…, bc1…) **or** an Extended Public Key (xpub / ypub / zpub). The integration detects the type automatically.

data.wallet: Bitcoin address or xpub / ypub / zpub
data.label: Name / Label (optional)

error.invalid_wallet: Invalid input. Please enter a Bitcoin address (1…, 3…, bc1…) or an Extended Public Key (xpub / ypub / zpub).
error.invalid_xpub: The Extended Public Key could not be processed. Check that you exported the correct key (zpub for Native SegWit, ypub for SegWit, xpub for Legacy).
error.xpub_bad_checksum: Invalid checksum — the key may have been copied incompletely.
error.xpub_bad_length: Invalid length — please enter the full Extended Public Key.
error.xpub_derivation_failed: Address derivation failed — check that this is a valid xpub/ypub/zpub.

abort.already_configured: This wallet is already set up.
